Payroll, HR, Benefits. Simplified.
Join 500,000+ small and medium-sized businesses that take care of their people with Gusto.
Create free account
How Gusto works
Run payroll in minutes with smart technology.
Payroll takes just a few clicks
Plus, we automatically file your taxes, help with compliance, and identify tax credits to help save you money you may never have known you qualified for.
Learn more about payroll →
Sync hours with payroll
Gusto automatically calculates and syncs your team’s hours, PTO, and holidays with payroll. Plus, we help you stay compliant with alerts, software integrations, and more.
See all time tools →
Pay yourself compliantly as a Solopreneur
S corps pay themselves a reasonable salary—stay compliant and save on taxes.
Learn about Gusto Solo →
Why Gusto
Saved over 80 hours a year
“Payroll used to take at least one full day per month. We’re able to run payroll bi-weekly now, which takes us less than an hour each month.”
Kevin Michael Gray
Founder, Approveme.com
Read the full story
Make a real difference with affordable employee benefits.
Supporting your team is more important than ever. With Gusto as your broker, health insurance administration comes at no extra cost. Move an existing plan or let our licensed advisors help you find the right coverage.
Learn more about benefits
Hire standout candidates and get them up to speed faster than ever.
Find and support great people from day 1. Use Gusto for job and applicant tracking, create custom onboarding checklists, and so much more.
Learn more about hiring and onboarding
But wait, there
’
s more.
Time
Talent
Insights
New business
Remote
Let’s find the right plan for your business
Choose from a variety of plans and add-ons. You won’t pay a cent until you’re ready to run payroll.
Compare plans
See how Gusto stacks up against other payroll providers.
9 out of 10
customers would recommend Gusto.
152 hrs/year
average time saved on tax & compliance by switching to Gusto.
4.5/5 stars
Average rating from Gusto customers.
Compare Gusto
Survey of 538 Gusto Customers, September 2024
Get started for free
You’re three steps away from easy, automated payroll.
Create an account.
It’s free to sign up. You’ll pick your plan and add your company details.
Add your people.
Add your employee details. They can even self-onboard to save you time.
Run your first payroll.
Once we have your employee and tax info, you can run payroll in just a few clicks.
Get started
Questions? Meet answers.
Compare Gusto
See how Gusto stacks up against other providers.
Compare Gusto
Search the help center

Site Map
Your Opt Out Preference Signal is Honored
Privacy Preference Center
Gusto and its advertising partners use cookies and other tracking technologies in order to, among other things, improve and personalize the website and show you ads promoting Gusto products, services, and features on other sites or apps that you may use or visit. Under some applicable privacy laws, these advertising activities may be considered a “sale” or “share” of data, or “targeted advertising". To opt out of these uses or disclosures, you can update your consent preferences by sliding the toggles to the left and then clicking the “Confirm My Choices” button.
Consent preferences set using the toggles will only apply to the web browser you’re currently using. You will need to update your preferences for each different device or browser you use to visit our website unless you have a Gusto account and are logged in. If you clear your cookies, your preferences will also reset.
We may also disclose personal information, such as your name, email address, and contact information to our partners so they can show you ads that are more relevant to your interests or market their products or services to you. To opt-out of “sales” or “sharing” of your data, or “targeted advertising” associated with your personal information, please complete our
Opt-Out Form
.
For more details, please read our Privacy Notice.
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Customize your Gusto plan with powerful add-ons.
Offer more meaningful benefits to your team, add powerful time-saving tools, and uncover valuable tax credits. See pricing details below.
Payroll
Global contractor payments
Manage payments to contractors in more than 120 countries, with no monthly per-contractor fee.
Foreign exchange rates may vary
$5 per payment to US-based bank accounts
State tax registration
We'll handle the state and local paperwork when you need to file payroll taxes in a new state.
Pricing varies by state
R&D tax credits
Simple pricing, powerful tax credits. Scan your payroll data to
save up to $250,000 in annual payroll tax offsets.
Pay 15% of identified tax credits
Discounts available with Premium Plan
Next-Day pay
Running payroll the day before your employees need to be paid.
$15/mo + 3/mo per person
Available with Simple plan
Instant pay
Hang on to your cash for as long as possible and still pay your team on time. Run payroll 24/7/365 with Instant pay and pay your team in minutes.
$100 per payroll
Available with all plans
Same-day pay
Keep your cash longer and still pay your team on time. Run payroll with same-day pay and pay your team within hours.
$90 per payroll
Available with all plans
Time & Attendance Plus
Plan and manage your team's time with time tracking synced to payroll, project tracking, time off, scheduling and more.
Try it free, then $6/mo per person
Available with Simple plan
HR tools
Priority Support
Gain prioritized positioning in access to phone and chat support for faster response time
$30/mo + $3/mo per person
Available with Simple and Plus plans
HR Resources
Access to certified HR experts, HR resource center, federal and state compliance alerts.
$50/mo + $5/mo per person
Available with Simple and Plus plans
Performance
Performance reviews, real-time feedback, goal tracking, employee surveys.
$3/mo per person
Available with Simple plan
Health benefits
Health insurance
Work with our licensed brokers to pick the right medical, dental, and vision plans for your team and budget.
Pay only for premiums
No Gusto administration fees
Health insurance broker integration
In most cases, we can integrate your existing broker and eligible health insurance plans right into Gusto.
$6/mo per eligible employee
Workers' compensation
Set up pay-as-you-go workers' comp plans that integrate with your payroll.
Starting at $14/mo
Life and disability
Offer life, short-term disability, or long-term disability insurance to give employees peace of mind.
Pay only for premiums
No administration fees
Money management
Gusto Money Plus
A modern way to manage and organize your business money. Access discounted transaction fees and workflow tools that give you more control.
Learn more.
$19/mo
Available on all plans
Tax-advantaged benefits
One $200 annual service charge covers all four account types.
Health savings accounts (HSAs)
Pre-tax savings accounts for qualified health expenses.
$2.50/mo per participant

Pre-tax flexible spending accounts for qualified health expenses.
$4/mo per participant
$20/mo minimum

Pre-tax flexible spending accounts for qualified dependent care expenses.
$4/mo per participant
$20/mo minimum
Commuter benefits
Pre-tax spending accounts for commuting costs.
$4/mo per participant
$20/mo minimum
401(k)
Empower your team to save for the future with a 401(k) that works seamlessly with payroll—simple to set up, easy to manage.
Pricing varies by 401(k) integration
Add-on features (except global contractor payments) not available with Contractor Only plan; Premium plan customers may receive discounts and waived fees for R&D tax services, broker integration, and more.
What to consider when choosing a payroll provider.
Does this work for teams my size?
Gusto was built for all kinds of teams. Some services are perfect for big corporations but overlook the needs of small businesses. That's why a flexible payroll and benefits provider is so important. Whether you have a handful of employees or your company is quickly expanding into new states, Gusto's platform offers flexible plans that cover everything from the basics to expert tools for fast-growing teams. Plus, you can easily upgrade or downgrade at any time.
What's included in pricing?
We believe the most essential tools should be included—that's why we don't charge extra for basic things like off-cycle payrolls. With Gusto, you can pick the best plan for you, then customize it with add-ons to get the powerful functionality you want while saving money on features you don't need.
Is it easy to switch?
Transferring your payroll data to a new provider can be daunting and tedious. With Gusto, you have someone to explain the process and help you through any tricky twists and turns. And if you have a larger team, we can often handle payroll data transfers on your behalf to help avoid errors and save you time. The same goes for your health benefits — we're happy to transfer eligible plans right into Gusto so you can keep everything in the same place, all automatically synced with payroll.
Will this grow with my business?
Think about how much your team might grow in the coming years. You'll want a payroll provider who can continue to serve your needs without making you jump through hoops or pay exorbitant additional costs. Gusto is a strong choice for small and medium sized companies with big aspirations. We understand your unique needs today and are committed to helping your team grow and thrive for years to come.
Pricing FAQs
Can I upgrade or downgrade at any time?
Yes, of course! Gusto was built to grow and evolve with your business. Whether you decide you need new features, or aren't using the ones you have, upgrading your plan will kick in immediately, and downgrades will go into effect at the beginning of the next billing period (the first of the month).
Do I have to sign a long-term contract?
Nope. Gusto is month-to-month. Cancel anytime.
How many times can I run payroll per month?
Every Gusto plan comes with unlimited payroll runs. We'll never charge you extra for things like off-cycle payrolls.
How much does health insurance administration through Gusto cost?
With Gusto as your broker, health insurance administration comes at no extra cost. You'll only pay the cost of the insurance premium. Need a quote? We have licensed advisors who can walk you through the process.
Want to keep your broker? For only $6/month per eligible employee, your broker can manage your plans right in Gusto. And Premium plan customers can integrate their health insurance broker for free.
What if my number of employees changes throughout the year?
With Gusto, you're only charged for active employees. As you add new team members, your monthly price will increase.
How do you bill for contractors?
U.S. contractors are billed at the per-person cost for any plan you select. We know you might not pay your contractors on a regular schedule, so we only bill you for contractors in months when you've paid them. For businesses who don't have any W-2 employees, we also have a Contractor Only plan available for $35/mo + $6/mo per contractor.
When you pay global contractors, there is no monthly per-contractor fee. Gusto charges only a small service and foreign exchange fee for each payment.
How do I sign up for Gusto?
We're happy to help whether you need to
set up your first payroll
as a new business (congrats!) or
transfer an existing payroll
from another provider (good choice).
Click here
to answer a few questions and get started.
If you are moving an existing payroll, you're going to want to have your EIN, and your team's addresses and salaries ready. Plus, if it's the middle of the year, gather any documentation about the payroll taxes you've already filed.
What tax forms will Gusto file for me?
We file federal, state, and local payroll tax forms on your company's behalf (things like Form W-2, Form 1099, Form 940, Form 941, Form 8974, and others). What's extra nice is that you can e-file, e-sign, e-fax, and e-store your documents right from your Gusto account. Easy!
Does Gusto integrate with other software?
We know it's hard to give up the software you love. That's why Gusto integrates with your favorite tools. We work with accounting programs like QuickBooks, Xero, Aplos, ZipBooks, Autobooks, and FreshBooks, plus other types of software like Expensify, Hubstaff, Clover, Homebase and more.
Check out all of our integrations
Where can I find Gusto pricing for accountants?
Being a Gusto accounting or bookkeeping partner comes with a ton of benefits — dedicated support, free payroll for your firm, people advisory training, increased revenue share, and perks to pass along to your clients.
Check out our Gusto for Partners page
or email
advisor@gusto.com
to learn more.
My business works with cannabis — can I use Gusto?
Yes. Gusto supports cannabis-related businesses (CRBs) across our Simple, Plus, and Premium payroll plans.
Because CRBs operate under additional banking and regulatory oversight, some plans require a
CRB compliance add-on
to support the extra monitoring, reporting, and operational work involved in running payroll for this industry.
Click here
for more info.
What level of support can I expect with my plan?
There are three types of support at Gusto:
Basic Support:
24/7 access to Gusto's online Help Center
Call or chat with our support team during our business hours
Priority Support:
Gain prioritized positioning in access to phone and chat support for faster response time
Dedicated Service Advisor:
Get a dedicated advisor for personalized Gusto support, maximizing your business growth and success
For the Simple plan:
You get Basic Support, and you can purchase the Priority Support add-on for $30/mo + $3/mo per person
For the Plus plan:
You get Basic Support, and you can purchase the two-in-one add-on (Priority Support and HR Resources) at $8/mo per person
For the Premium plan:
You get Priority Support and a Dedicated Service Advisor
Where can I find more answers?
If you're shopping around, we recommend exploring our site a bit — you'll find information about
payroll
,
benefits
,
time tools
, and more. Plus, our
Help Center
has lots of help information, especially for existi

Privacy Preference Center
Gusto and its advertising partners use cookies and other tracking technologies in order to, among other things, improve and personalize the website and show you ads promoting Gusto products, services, and features on other sites or apps that you may use or visit. Under some applicable privacy laws, these advertising activities may be considered a “sale” or “share” of data, or “targeted advertising". To opt out of these uses or disclosures, you can update your consent preferences by sliding the toggles to the left and then clicking the “Confirm My Choices” button.
Consent preferences set using the toggles will only apply to the web browser you’re currently using. You will need to update your preferences for each different device or browser you use to visit our website unless you have a Gusto account and are logged in. If you clear your cookies, your preferences will also reset.
We may also disclose personal information, such as your name, email address, and contact information to our partners so they can show you ads that are more relevant to your interests or market their products or services to you. To opt-out of “sales” or “sharing” of your data, or “targeted advertising” associated with your personal information, please complete our
Opt-Out Form
.
For more details, please read our Privacy Notice.
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Back Button
Cookie List
Search Icon
Filter Icon
Clear

15Five
15Five combines evidence-based software, education, and community to create top-performing organizations. Learn more about the Gusto and 15Five integration.
New 15five customers get 30% off any annual plan
7Shifts
7shifts helps restaurant managers schedule staff, reduce labor costs, and streamline communication. See how Gusto easily integrates with 7shifts.
Get 3 Months free
Accelo
Accelo transforms the way professional service businesses manage client work to improve their performance and profitability. See how your company can benefit fr
Amalgam
Amalgam makes the tools your team uses feel like a single integrated ecosystem. Access and sync your payroll data from anywhere with the Gusto and Amalgam
Analytics by Syft
Create beautiful dashboards, reports, graphs & consolidations with your accounting or ecommerce data - then complement it with your Gusto payroll & HR info
Aplos
Gusto connects your payroll to your accounting in Aplos, an online software made for nonprofits, churches and schools.
Get 3 months free
ApplicantPro
Post jobs, quickly communicate with applicants, and hire the best ones, all without breaking the bank or a sweat!
Ardius
The Ardius platform integrates with existing financial platforms and utilizes automation to complete R+D tax studies.
Arvo
Arvo makes claiming employment based tax credits simple. We've helped hundreds of businesses claim nearly $700MM since 2014.
Asana
Asana is a web and mobile application designed to help teams organize, track, and manage their work.
Ascensus
Supports the following 401(k) providers: Fisher, Goldman Sachs, Merrill Lynch, Morgan Stanley, Sharebuilder, State Farm, and Vanguard (VRPA)
Ashby
Ashby’s recruiting platform enables teams to hire more efficiently by combining features for the entire recruiting process, from sourcing to offer.
Get 20% off your first year
AttendanceBot
Track time, vacations, schedules, and shift calendars within Slack and Microsoft Teams/M365.
50% off your first 3 months
AvaHR
AvaHR is the hiring software company for growing small businesses. More than an ATS, we help you be great at hiring through our powerful job posting framework.
Get 40% off Startup or Growth plans
Background Checks
The Gusto integration with Checkr allows you to run and review background checks on candidates and existing employees or contractors, all from within your Gusto
Popular
Bench
Let Bench's experts do your bookkeeping and income tax prep. Connect your Gusto account so your payroll data automatically syncs with your other financial data.
Gusto customers get 20% off their first 6 months with Bench
Betterment at Work
Betterment provides a fully-integrated 401(k) experience with Gusto, allowing you to provide the best financial wellness benefits to your employees.
Bitlancer Studio Tools
Bitlancer Studio Tools automates Mariana Tek instructor and staff payroll calculations by seamlessly integrating Mariana Tek with Gusto.
Bookkeeper360
Bookkeeper360 is the simplest way to view your finances, track your goals, and access accounting experts all in one place.
Get 20% off your first 3 months
Box
Box lets you store all of your content online, so you can access, manage and share it from anywhere.

analysis.name: Gusto
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one payroll, benefits, and HR platform built for small and medium-sized businesses, handling taxes, compliance, and people management automatically.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small to mid-sized US businesses (1–500 employees) needing automated payroll, benefits administration, and HR in one platform without dedicated HR staff

features.name: full-service payroll
features.description: Run unlimited payrolls with automatic tax calculations, filings, and payments

features.name: direct deposit
features.description: Direct deposit to employee bank accounts or printable checks as alternative

features.name: automatic tax filing
features.description: Automatically files and pays federal, state, and local payroll taxes

features.name: payroll autopilot
features.description: Scheduled automatic payroll runs without manual intervention

features.name: payroll approvals
features.description: Approval workflow for payroll before funds are disbursed

features.name: custom admin permissions
features.description: Role-based access controls for payroll and HR administrators

features.name: multiple pay rates and schedules
features.description: Support for employees with different pay rates or pay schedule frequencies

features.name: single-state payroll
features.description: Payroll processing for businesses operating in a single US state

features.name: multi-state payroll
features.description: Payroll processing across multiple US states with compliance handling

features.name: domestic contractor payments
features.description: Onboard and pay US-based independent contractors with 1099 filing

features.name: form 1099 creation and filing
features.description: Automated creation and IRS filing of 1099-NEC forms for contractors

features.name: global contractor payments
features.description: Pay international contractors in 120+ countries; add-on with per-payment fee
features.evidence_quote: Manage payments to contractors in more than 120 countries, with no monthly per-contractor fee

features.name: gusto global (international employee hiring)
features.description: Hire and manage international employees through Gusto's global platform
features.evidence_quote: Gusto Global — Pay global contractors and hire international employees

features.name: next-day pay
features.description: Run payroll the day before payday; add-on available on Simple plan
features.evidence_quote: Running payroll the day before your employees need to be paid. $15/mo + 3/mo per person

features.name: same-day pay
features.description: Run payroll same day employees are paid; $90 per payroll add-on
features.evidence_quote: Run payroll with same-day pay and pay your team within hours. $90 per payroll

features.name: instant pay
features.description: Pay employees in minutes, 24/7/365; $100 per payroll add-on
features.evidence_quote: Run payroll 24/7/365 with Instant pay and pay your team in minutes. $100 per payroll

features.name: 4-day pay
features.description: Standard contractor payment settlement in 4 business days

features.name: state tax registration
features.description: Handles state and local paperwork when expanding payroll to a new state; add-on
features.evidence_quote: We'll handle the state and local paperwork when you need to file payroll taxes in a new state

features.name: expenses and reimbursements
features.description: Employee expense submission and employer reimbursement workflow

features.name: workforce cost reports
features.description: Reports on total workforce spend and labor cost breakdowns

features.name: custom reports
features.description: Build custom HR and payroll reports with configurable fields

features.name: employer mobile app
features.description: Mobile app for employers to manage payroll and HR on the go

features.name: employee mobile app
features.description: Gusto employee app for pay stubs, benefits, and time off requests

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Employee time tracking with automatic sync to payroll

features.name: time off requests and approvals
features.description: Employee time-off request submission and manager approval workflow

features.name: pto policies and holiday pay
features.description: Configure PTO accrual policies and holiday pay schedules
features.evidence_quote: Basic PTO policies and holiday pay

features.name: time scheduling
features.description: Employee shift scheduling and schedule management tools

features.name: project tracking
features.description: Track employee time against specific projects; part of Time & Attendance Plus
features.evidence_quote: plan and manage your team's time with time tracking synced to payroll, project tracking

features.name: time and attendance plus
features.description: Advanced time module: tracking, project tracking, scheduling, time off; $6/mo/person add-on
features.evidence_quote: Try it free, then $6/mo per person — Available with Simple plan

features.name: pto sync with payroll
features.description: Automatically calculates and syncs team hours, PTO, and holidays with payroll
features.evidence_quote: Gusto automatically calculates and syncs your team's hours, PTO, and holidays with payroll

features.name: health insurance administration
features.description: Broker services and administration for medical, dental, and vision plans at no admin fee
features.evidence_quote: With Gusto as your broker, health insurance administration comes at no extra cost

features.name: health insurance broker integration
features.description: Integrate an existing broker and health plans into Gusto; $6/mo per eligible employee
features.evidence_quote: In most cases, we can integrate your existing broker and eligible health insurance plans right into Gusto

features.name: 401k and retirement benefits
features.description: Integrated 401(k) plan administration with partner providers

features.name: benefits store for individuals
features.description: Marketplace for individual employee benefit selections

features.name: workers compensation
features.description: Pay-as-you-go workers' comp insurance integrated with payroll
features.evidence_quote: Workers' compensation — Protect you and your team if an injury or illness happens

features.name: gusto wallet
features.description: Employee financial wellness tool consolidating expenses, income, and borrowing
features.evidence_quote: Gusto Money — Bring your expenses, income, and borrowing needs under one roof

features.name: charity donations via payroll
features.description: Employees can set up recurring charitable payroll deductions

features.name: r&d tax credits
features.description: Scans payroll data to identify R&D credits up to $250K/year; 15% fee of identified credits
features.evidence_quote: Scan your payroll data to save up to $250,000 in annual payroll tax offsets. Pay 15% of identified tax credits

features.name: earned income tax credit (eitc) identification
features.description: Identifies federal, state, and local EITC eligibility for employees
features.evidence_quote: Federal, state, and local Earned Income Tax Credits (EITC)

features.name: 401k tax credits
features.description: Identifies and helps claim 401(k) startup tax credits for small businesses
features.evidence_quote: Claim 401(k) tax credits for your small business

features.name: hiring and applicant tracking
features.description: Job posting, applicant tracking, and candidate management system
features.evidence_quote: Use Gusto for job and applicant tracking

features.name: offer letters
features.description: Generate and send digital offer letters to candidates
features.evidence_quote: Offer letters, checklists, software setup, and more

features.name: employee self-onboarding
features.description: New hires enter their own personal and banking details to save admin time
features.evidence_quote: Add your employee details. They can even self-onboard to save you time.

features.name: custom onboarding checklists
features.description: Create configurable onboarding task checklists for new hires

features.name: software provisioning
features.description: Automatically provision and deprovision employee software access during onboarding/offboarding

features.name: performance reviews
features.description: Structured employee performance review cycles with feedback collection
features.evidence_quote: Performance reviews, real-time feedback, goal tracking, employee surveys

features.name: real-time feedback
features.description: Continuous feedback tools for managers and employees between formal reviews
features.evidence_quote: Performance reviews, real-time feedback, goal tracking, employee surveys

features.name: goal tracking
features.description: Set and track individual and team goals tied to performance cycles
features.evidence_quote: Performance reviews, real-time feedback, goal tracking, employee surveys

features.name: employee surveys
features.description: Pulse surveys to gather employee engagement and sentiment data
features.evidence_quote: Performance reviews, real-time feedback, goal tracking, employee surveys

features.name: interview scorecards
features.description: Structured interview evaluation forms for consistent candidate assessment

features.name: compensation management
features.description: Tools for managing and benchmarking employee compensation

features.name: hr resource center
features.description: Library of HR templates, compliance guides, and best-practice documents
features.evidence_quote: Access to certified HR experts, HR resource center, federal and state compliance alerts

features.name: compliance alerts
features.description: Automated federal and state employment law compliance notifications

features.name: certified hr experts access
features.description: On-demand access to certified HR professionals for guidance and questions

features.name: dedicated service advisor
features.description: Named dedicated support advisor for Premium plan customers

features.name: priority support
features.description: Prioritized phone and chat support queue; $30/mo + $3/mo per person add-on
features.evidence_quote: Gain prioritized positioning in access to phone and chat support for faster response time

features.name: payroll migration and account setup
features.description: Assisted migration of payroll data and setup from previous provider

features.name: insights and reporting
features.description: Data-backed HR and payroll dashboards and pre-built reports
features.evidence_quote: Insights and reporting — Data-backed guidance and reports

features.name: pay insights (compensation benchmarking)
features.description: Real-time compensation benchmarking using Gusto's aggregate payroll data

differentiators: Health insurance administration included at no extra Gusto fee — brokers charge nothing
Automatic tax filing and compliance without manual intervention
R&D tax credit scanning directly from payroll data (up to $250K/year savings)
152 hours/year average time saved on tax and compliance vs. prior providers
500,000+ businesses served — scale signal for SMB trust
Embedded payroll API for developers and platform builders (Gusto Embedded)
9 out of 10 customers would recommend Gusto
Free account setup with no payment until first payroll run
Global contractor payments in 120+ countries with no monthly per-contractor fee

praised: Significant time savings: 'Payroll used to take at least one full day per month. We're able to run payroll bi-weekly now, which takes us less than an hour each month.' — Kevin Michael Gray, Founder Approveme.com
Ease of use and automation reducing manual HR workload
4.5–4.6 star average across Capterra (4,137 reviews) and Software Advice
sources: Capterra (4,137 reviews cited on pricing page)
Software Advice (4,137 reviews cited on pricing page)

tiers.name: Contractor Only
tiers.headline_inclusions: Domestic contractor payments, 4-day pay, Form 1099 creation and filings; no W-2 employee support

tiers.name: Simple
tiers.headline_inclusions: Single-state payroll, unlimited payrolls, tax filings, basic PTO, domestic contractors, employee/employer app

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Multi-state payroll, next-day pay, time tracking, expenses, workforce cost reports, everything in Simple

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Dedicated Service Advisor, certified HR experts, performance & comp mgmt, custom reports, priority support, payroll migration

pricing.notes: Contractor Only plan base fee is currently $0/mo (limited-time offer; normally $35/mo). Add-ons sold separately: Next-day pay ($15/mo + $3/person), Same-day pay ($90/payroll), Instant pay ($100/payroll), Time & Attendance Plus ($6/person/mo), Priority Support ($30/mo + $3/person), HR Resources ($50/mo + $5/person), Performance ($3/person/mo), State tax registration (varies by state), Global contractor payments ($5/payment to US bank). Health insurance: pay premiums only, no Gusto admin fee. R&D credits: 15% of identified credits (discounts on Premium). Gusto Solo plan exists for S-corp owner self-pay (separate product, pricing not disclosed in sources). No annual contract required.
